 {"id":"bd-eyrh","title":"🤝 HANDOFF: Review remaining beads PRs","description":"## Current State
Just merged PR #653 (doctor refactor) and added tests to restore coverage.

## Remaining Open PRs to Review
Run `gh pr list --repo steveyegge/beads` to see current list. As of handoff:

1. #655 - feat: Linear Integration (jblwilliams)
2. #651 - feat(audit): agent audit trail (dchichkov)
3. #648 - Stop init creating redundant @AGENTS.md (maphew)
4. #646 - fix(unix): handle Statfs field types (jordanhubbard)
5. #645 - feat: /plan-to-beads Claude Code command (petebytes)
6. #642, #641, #640 - sync branch fixes (cpdata)

## Review Checklist
- Check CI status with `gh pr checks <num> --repo steveyegge/beads`
- Verify no .beads/ data leaking (we have a hook now)
- Review code quality
- Merge good ones, request changes on problematic ones

## Notes
- User wants us to be proactive about merging good PRs
- Can add tests ourselves if coverage drops","status":"tombstone","priority":2,"issue_type":"message","created_at":"2025-12-19T17:44:34.149837-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T13:53:33.613805-08:00","deleted_at":"2025-12-21T13:53:33.613805-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"message"}
 {"id":"bd-eysh","title":"Test refile v2","description":"Testing improved refile","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-31T13:00:22.994648-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/grip","updated_at":"2025-12-31T13:00:30.637161-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T13:00:30.637161-08:00","close_reason":"Refiled to gt-w66v4"}
 {"id":"bd-eyto","title":"Time-dependent tests may be flaky near TTL boundary","description":"Several tombstone merge tests use time.Now() to create test data: time.Now().Add(-24 * time.Hour), time.Now().Add(-60 * 24 * time.Hour), etc. While these work reliably in practice (24h vs 30d TTL has large margin), they could theoretically be flaky if: 1) Tests run slowly, 2) System clock changes during test, 3) TTL constants change. Recommendation: Consider using a fixed reference time or time injection for deterministic tests. Lower priority since current margin is large. Files: internal/merge/merge_test.go:1337-1338, 1352-1353, 1548-1549, 1590-1591","status":"hooked","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-05T16:37:02.348143-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T15:44:43.36321-08:00"}

 {"id":"bd-f0n","title":"Git history fallback missing timeout - could hang on large repos","description":"## Problem

The git commands in `checkGitHistoryForDeletions` have no timeout. On large repos with extensive history, `git log --all -S` or `git log --all -G` can take a very long time (minutes).

## Location
`internal/importer/importer.go:899` and `:930`

## Impact
- Import could hang indefinitely
- User has no feedback that git search is running
- No way to cancel except killing the process

## Fix
Add context with timeout to git commands:

```go
ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
defer cancel()
cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, "git", ...)
```

Also consider adding a `--since` flag to bound the git history search.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-25T12:48:24.388639-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-25T15:04:53.669714-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-25T15:04:53.669714-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-f0wm","title":"Swarm status doesn't update after task completions","description":"During swarm bd-784c, the swarm status remained at '9% (1/11 tasks merged)' even after 5 tasks were completed and closed.

**Observed:**
```
gt swarm status bd-784c
Progress: 9% (1/11 tasks merged)
```

But bd list showed 4+ issues closed:
- bd-j3dj, bd-kkka, bd-1tkd, bd-9btu all closed

**Expected:**
Swarm status should reflect actual completion count, either by:
1. Polling issue status from beads
2. Updating when polecats close issues
3. Updating when commits are pushed to integration branch

**Impact:**
Coordinator (me) had to manually check bd list to know actual progress.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-28T16:17:49.27816-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/dave","updated_at":"2025-12-28T22:14:20.098792-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-28T22:14:20.098792-08:00"}
